case_title: LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, VS. SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM,

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM, A DELAWARE CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 455 MARKET STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $960.10 (APP FOR WRIT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR VACATING JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL CASE WITH PREJUDICE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER (AMENDED) FOR PLTF'S ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING VACATING JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY 455 MARKET STREET LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SPANISH BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC.
